name: Greek-Style Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan with wax paper.
2. Lightly grease the sides of the pan with margarine.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in yogurt and lemon peel.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 50 minutes, or until set.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan before removing it.
9. Chill thoroughly.
Toping Instructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine honey and margarine.
2. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until boiling.
3. Continue boiling for 1 minute.
4. Cool to spreading consistency.
5. Spread over the chilled cheesecake just before serving.
6. Garnish with lemon peel and fresh mint, if desired.
